decision.rationale: SEC NPORT-P source reachability and XML holdings parsing were confirmed, including EDGAR filing timestamps and holdings-level CUSIPs/values. The scout did not produce a conservative timestamp-safe prior-holding change event table with reliable public ticker/CUSIP mapping to liquid U.S. common stocks/ETFs. Rejected at source/event-table gate; no performance evaluation was run.

data.source: SEC EDGAR quarterly full-index master files and public filing text/XML documents

bounded_probe.sample_method: first 80 NPORT-P filings from the concatenated checked-quarter EDGAR master-index order

candidate_pool.description: All public SEC NPORT-P filings over the checked EDGAR index span, then holdings with acceptance/public timestamp, report period, fund/series identifiers, asset category, issuer category, CUSIP/name, balance, value, and percent-of-fund fields.

failed_components: filing-provided ticker coverage absent in bounded sample
public conservative CUSIP-to-ticker mapping not established
same-series prior-holding comparison/event table not completed
liquid daily-bar coverage not checked because mapping gate failed
source_gate.reason: The bounded probe supports that EDGAR NPORT-P data exist and are parseable, but the issue's falsifier requires a reproducible timestamp-safe mapped holdings-change event table before any performance work. That table was not built, and the observed sample had no filing-provided tickers.

performance_run.reason: Source/event-table gate failed; no returns, event windows, controls, costs, random periods, shifted/shuffled labels, or orders were evaluated.

limitations: The probe was bounded and did not retain raw SEC filings or raw event rows.
NPORT-P holdings include many non-U.S., debt, structured, loan, derivative, and cash-like assets; asset category EC alone is not sufficient to identify tradable U.S. common stocks or ETFs.
CUSIP mapping is a material dependency; inferring tickers from current names would introduce survivorship and ambiguity.
No qfa/market daily bars were requested because no valid mapped security universe was produced.
No shifted, shuffled, filing-calendar, momentum/reversal, sector, or fund-family concentration controls were run.
status_rationale: Rejected for this research cycle at source/event-table gate with a disabled zero-weight model. No direct N-PORT refinement child should be created.
